description: Small fragment from a legal deed (bill of release?) written by Halfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi (fl. 1100–38 CE). One of the parties has the rare name ʿAbdallāh b. Shemuel (likely identical with ʿOvadya b. Shemuel who appears in a few other legal documents from this period). AA/ASE.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
